caribbean.headline: Small Craft Conditions Near Roatan, Lighter Winds Elsewhere
caribbean.paragraph: Roatan is experiencing sustained northeast winds near 24 kt with seas to 6.6 ft and an ENE swell with a 9 s period, and there is 38% rain probability. I recommend mariners treat conditions as Small Craft Advisory-level and exercise caution around the port while Martinique reports lighter 13 kt winds.

mediterranean.headline: Light winds and modest seas across Western Mediterranean
mediterranean.paragraph: Lisbon is experiencing light winds of 10 kt, 3.3 ft seas with an 11 s dominant W swell and a 50% rain probability. I expect conditions to remain generally benign for western Mediterranean transits, though Mykonos will be breezier with winds near 19 kt and should be monitored for elevated seas.
